props.ChoiceText: A difficult text resisted you until you learned how to read past its pride and yours.
props.ChoiceBio: A stubborn passage taught you that learning sometimes advances only after your vanity gives way.

0.TransitionText: Because a stubborn passage taught you that learning sometimes advances only after your vanity gives way, hard-won authority opened a path toward influence and court.
